package com.chinatower.platform.cascade;

import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;
import com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject;
import com.chinatower.common.core.web.domain.AjaxResult;
import com.chinatower.common.entity.Result;
import com.chinatower.common.entity.ResultCode;
import com.chinatower.platform.entity.admin.SysConfig;
import com.chinatower.platform.model.dto.CascadeDto;
import com.chinatower.platform.utils.CascadeConnectUtils;
import com.chinatower.system.api.feign.client.SystemFeignClient;
import com.xxl.job.core.biz.model.ReturnT;
import com.xxl.job.core.handler.annotation.XxlJob;
import java.util.HashMap;
import javax.annotation.Resource;
import org.slf4j.Logger;
import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
import org.springframework.util.ObjectUtils;

  @Service
public class CascadeService {
    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CascadeService.class);
    @Autowired
    private CascadeConnectUtils cascadeConnectUtils;
    @Resource
    private SystemFeignClient systemFeignClient;

    public CascadeService() {
    }
    @XxlJob(value = "cascadeHeartBeat")
    public ReturnT<String> cascadeHeartBeat(String p0) {
        CascadeService.log.info("cascadeHeartBeat定时任务开始！");
        try {
            Exception p2 = null;
            AjaxResult p3 = this.systemFeignClient.getConfValue("platform_code");
            if (ResultCode.SUCCESS.getCode() == ((Integer) p3.get("code")).intValue()) {
                SysConfig p4 = ((SysConfig) JSON.parseObject(JSON.toJSONString(p3.get("data")), SysConfig.class));
                if (!ObjectUtils.isEmpty(p4)) {
                    String p2 = p4.getConfigValue();
                }
            }
            HashMap p4 = new HashMap();
            p4.put("colonyCode", p2);
            p4.put("colonyApp", "general");
            p4.put("status", 1);
            CascadeDto p5 = new CascadeDto();
            p5.setUri("/colony/heartbeat");
            p5.setFromPlatformCode(p2);
            p5.setBody(JSONObject.toJSONString(p4));
            Result p6 = this.cascadeConnectUtils.sendToCascade(p5);
            if (p6.getCode() != ResultCode.SUCCESS.getCode()) {
                CascadeService.log.info("cascadeHeartBeat定时任务失败！");
                return ReturnT.FAIL;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            CascadeService.log.info("cascadeHeartBeat定时任务失败！", e);
            return ReturnT.FAIL;
        }
        CascadeService.log.info("cascadeHeartBeat定时任务结束！");
        return ReturnT.SUCCESS;
    }
}
